body:
## Summary
Wire the custom state machine (Step 5) to Socket.io, replacing XState actor management.

## Changes
- **pve/runtime.ts**: room lifecycle using GameContext, no XState
- **utils/pveHandlers.ts**: Socket events to transition(ctx, event) calls
- **socket.ts**: converted to TS, registers both old and new handlers
- **types/events.ts**: added GameEvent union type

## Test plan
- [x] tsc --noEmit: zero errors
- [x] 12 new runtime tests, 194 total passing
title: feat(socket): wire custom state machine to Socket.io events
